title: CTOV - Paladins & Priests compat
description: Compatibility datapack between CTOV and Paladins and Priests mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Paladins & Priests. You will find some sanctuary in the villages. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**Paladins & Priests mod**

Paladin & Priest mod can be obtained from [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paladins-and-priests)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
